# CIVID — Verified Conflict Impact Dataset (All-in-One Project Brief)

This repository is intended to host a verified, phased conflict-impact dataset project.

## Scope

Work one country or conflict area at a time. Phase 1 focuses on Palestine / Gaza.

## Principles

- Use verified sources only.
- Preserve source citations for every record.
- Do not invent or infer unsupported facts.
- Keep dataset tables separate and linkable.

## Structure

- data/phase1_palestine/
- data/phase2_sudan/
- schema/
- src/
- notebooks/

## Bootstrap

Run the setup script to create folders, starter CSVs, and the conda environment.
